segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hey, are you using this bench?

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Yeah, but I've got one set left.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: No problem. Mind if I work in after that?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. I'm still figuring out the layout here.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I just moved to Boston. Trying to keep some kind of routine.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Smart. This place gets packed after work.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. I'll try mornings then.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: By the way, do people usually wipe down equipment after each set here?

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Yeah, wipes are over there by the column.
